rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing root references or removing invalid clauses
Move implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Use only visible identifiers in the current scope
Avoid package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code
Ensure guarantees reference only valid features at their scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
Use eq helpers for reusable expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code
Do not move valid type-level guarantees to the implementation annex
Do not leave unresolved references in guarantees
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
